persona: Recruiter pastes a full job description in one shot, matching the assignment's own sample phrasing ("Here is a text from job description: xx").

turns.user: Here is a text from job description: We are hiring a Senior Data Analyst to join our commercial analytics team. The role requires strong SQL and Excel skills, experience presenting insights to non-technical stakeholders, and sound numerical reasoning. This is a selection process for a mid-to-senior hire.

assertions.notes: A single dense JD paste should be enough context to recommend immediately without forcing a clarification round, even without hitting every keyword bucket.
